title: felicia zeyheri subsp. linifolia
intro: Felicia zeyheri subsp. linifolia, commonly known as African bush daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions. The herbal preparations of Felicia zeyheri subsp. linifolia typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments.
